dict.string: Amber uses your contacts to map your relationships and show who you know in your health network.
Amber reads your activity, sleep, and workout data to track your physical health dimension.
Amber writes health data such as mindfulness sessions to your Health app.
Amber uses your location to show where your connections are on the Find My Friends map.
Amber uses your location in the background to keep your Find My Friends map current.
Amber needs your photo library to set profile photos for you and your contacts.
Amber saves shared network photos to your library.
Amber uses the camera to take profile photos.
Amber reads your calendar to suggest relationship touchpoints and track social health.
Amber creates reminders for relationship follow-ups and action items.
Amber uses Face ID to protect your private health data.
Amber uses the microphone for voice notes on contact interactions.
Amber transcribes voice notes to add to your contact memories.

AmberApp
